title: couepia chrysocalyx
intro: Couepia chrysocalpyx, also known as the golden-leaf couepia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Chrysobalanaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Couepia chrysocalyx include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Couepia chrysocalyx can be made by infusing its leaves in water or using its bark in a decoction, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
